## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Firework to discuss content strategy, lead generation, and website optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/FgXEvUs-EGbMSj6zqmazVdm-NdMA5iwq?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content strategy showing positive results: New beauty industry articles generating good clicks/impressions](https://fathom.video/share/FgXEvUs-EGbMSj6zqmazVdm-NdMA5iwq?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Lead magnet implementation progressing: Cameron developing dynamic CTAs based on blog categories](https://fathom.video/share/FgXEvUs-EGbMSj6zqmazVdm-NdMA5iwq?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Tracking issues identified: Some lead submissions appear suspicious, internal testing may be skewing data](https://fathom.video/share/FgXEvUs-EGbMSj6zqmazVdm-NdMA5iwq?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Action items: Improve blog categorization, expand content for fashion/grocery, focus on content creation topics](https://fathom.video/share/FgXEvUs-EGbMSj6zqmazVdm-NdMA5iwq?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance and Lead Generation

  - [321 articles published, 13 ready for publishing](https://fathom.video/share/FgXEvUs-EGbMSj6zqmazVdm-NdMA5iwq?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [5 lead submissions last week (4 excluding internal submission)](https://fathom.video/share/FgXEvUs-EGbMSj6zqmazVdm-NdMA5iwq?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Monthly average of 5 leads, with spikes in Dec (10) and Jan (15)](https://fathom.video/share/FgXEvUs-EGbMSj6zqmazVdm-NdMA5iwq?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [Potential tracking issues identified: Some leads don't correlate with click data](https://fathom.video/share/FgXEvUs-EGbMSj6zqmazVdm-NdMA5iwq?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)
  - [Action: Remove internal users from lead reports to improve accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/FgXEvUs-EGbMSj6zqmazVdm-NdMA5iwq?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)

### SEO and Traffic Analysis

  - [25k impression growth (15% increase) compared to previous week](https://fathom.video/share/FgXEvUs-EGbMSj6zqmazVdm-NdMA5iwq?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Clicks relatively flat at \~120k average from Google](https://fathom.video/share/FgXEvUs-EGbMSj6zqmazVdm-NdMA5iwq?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
  - [New beauty industry articles performing well, generating clicks in first week](https://fathom.video/share/FgXEvUs-EGbMSj6zqmazVdm-NdMA5iwq?tab=summary&timestamp=971.0)
  - [Action: Monitor high-converting blogs to optimize traffic and keywords](https://fathom.video/share/FgXEvUs-EGbMSj6zqmazVdm-NdMA5iwq?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)

### Blog Categorization and Lead Magnet Implementation

  - [Current categorization too broad (e.g., "Industry Insights")](https://fathom.video/share/FgXEvUs-EGbMSj6zqmazVdm-NdMA5iwq?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)
  - [Cameron developing dynamic CTAs based on blog categories](https://fathom.video/share/FgXEvUs-EGbMSj6zqmazVdm-NdMA5iwq?tab=summary&timestamp=1079.0)
  - [Action: Create more specific categories (e.g., beauty, fashion, grocery)](https://fathom.video/share/FgXEvUs-EGbMSj6zqmazVdm-NdMA5iwq?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
  - [Action: Cameron to develop script for automated blog categorization](https://fathom.video/share/FgXEvUs-EGbMSj6zqmazVdm-NdMA5iwq?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
  - [Interim solution: Ensure beauty playbook magnet on relevant blogs](https://fathom.video/share/FgXEvUs-EGbMSj6zqmazVdm-NdMA5iwq?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)

### Content Creation Strategy

  - [Fashion articles ready for publishing, grocery industry focus next week](https://fathom.video/share/FgXEvUs-EGbMSj6zqmazVdm-NdMA5iwq?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
  - [Spring-related topics identified (e.g., spring sales, marketing tips)](https://fathom.video/share/FgXEvUs-EGbMSj6zqmazVdm-NdMA5iwq?tab=summary&timestamp=1309.0)
  - [New focus on content creation pain points for brands](https://fathom.video/share/FgXEvUs-EGbMSj6zqmazVdm-NdMA5iwq?tab=summary&timestamp=1453.0)
  - [Action: Develop articles on simplifying content creation/curation (e.g., myths, leveraging user reviews, influencers)](https://fathom.video/share/FgXEvUs-EGbMSj6zqmazVdm-NdMA5iwq?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)

### Lead Magnet Optimization

  - [Consider A/B testing lead magnet designs and placements](https://fathom.video/share/FgXEvUs-EGbMSj6zqmazVdm-NdMA5iwq?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
  - [Explore more targeted lead magnets for specific topics (e.g., beauty engagement)](https://fathom.video/share/FgXEvUs-EGbMSj6zqmazVdm-NdMA5iwq?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
  - [Action: Create specific lead magnets for top 10-20 articles as a test](https://fathom.video/share/FgXEvUs-EGbMSj6zqmazVdm-NdMA5iwq?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Consider testing new industry report as a lead magnet](https://fathom.video/share/FgXEvUs-EGbMSj6zqmazVdm-NdMA5iwq?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Prioritize content creation topics (10-15 articles)](https://fathom.video/share/FgXEvUs-EGbMSj6zqmazVdm-NdMA5iwq?tab=summary&timestamp=1725.0)
  - [Improve blog categorization (Cameron to develop automated script)](https://fathom.video/share/FgXEvUs-EGbMSj6zqmazVdm-NdMA5iwq?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
  - [Implement dynamic CTAs based on blog categories](https://fathom.video/share/FgXEvUs-EGbMSj6zqmazVdm-NdMA5iwq?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
  - [Create specific lead magnets for top-performing articles](https://fathom.video/share/FgXEvUs-EGbMSj6zqmazVdm-NdMA5iwq?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Test industry report as a potential lead magnet](https://fathom.video/share/FgXEvUs-EGbMSj6zqmazVdm-NdMA5iwq?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Remove internal users from lead reports for accurate tracking](https://fathom.video/share/FgXEvUs-EGbMSj6zqmazVdm-NdMA5iwq?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
  - [Monitor high-converting blogs for optimization opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/FgXEvUs-EGbMSj6zqmazVdm-NdMA5iwq?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)
